description: This file implements an in-memory repository for managing personas, including CRUD operations, versioning, and draft/final state management, for a Node.js backend.

methods.name: _nowIso
methods.description: Returns the current timestamp in ISO format.

methods.name: _ensurePersonaExists
methods.description: Checks if a persona exists by ID, returns the persona object or null.

methods.name: _nextVersion
methods.description: Calculates the next version number for a persona based on existing versions.

methods.name: createPersona
methods.description: Creates a new persona with optional initial JSON data, assigns a UUID, and initializes versioning.

methods.name: getPersonaById
methods.description: Fetches a persona by its ID.

methods.name: updatePersona
methods.description: Updates persona metadata such as title.

methods.name: createPersonaVersion
methods.description: Creates a new version of a persona, optionally specifying the version number.

methods.name: listPersonaVersions
methods.description: Lists all versions of a persona in ascending order.

methods.name: getLatestPersonaVersion
methods.description: Retrieves the most recent version of a persona.

methods.name: saveDraft
methods.description: Saves a draft JSON payload for a persona.

methods.name: getDraft
methods.description: Retrieves the latest draft for a persona.

methods.name: saveFinal
methods.description: Saves a final JSON payload for a persona.

methods.name: getFinal
methods.description: Retrieves the final JSON payload for a persona.
